summary: Iteration_13 H2 canonical scale fix on /discovery-process verified. All 3 previously-overridden H2s (MultiSite, WeekOne, WeekTwo) now render at canonical .brief-doc-h2 scale (48px at 1440px viewport). Cross-page consistency confirmed against /approach. No console errors, hero depth unchanged at 788px, pivot pattern intact.
critical_code_review_comments: /case-studies returned 0 .brief-doc-h2 elements during cross-page check — not a regression from this iteration but worth confirming if that page intentionally uses a different H2 class or if the class was missed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration_13 verified at 1440x900. Test results: (1) All 9 h2.brief-doc-h2 on /discovery-process measure 48px computed font-size (canonical clamp(30,3.4vw,48) max). (2) MultiSite, WeekOne, WeekTwo H2s confirmed at 48px with no inline fontSize style attribute (only some H2s retain unrelated inline styles like 'align-items: center' or 'color: white' which is fine). (3) /approach reference H2s also = 48px → cross-page consistency confirmed. (4) /case-studies has 0 .brief-doc-h2 elements (different markup — informational, not a regression). (5) .pivot child span: fontFamily=Newsreader serif, fontStyle=italic, color=rgb(232,147,70) gold, display=block (renders on own line) — all 9 H2s consistent. (6) Hero depth on /discovery-process = 788px (matches iteration_9 baseline, no regression). (7) Zero console errors/warnings.
